channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Geopolitical news headlines curated by AI

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran submits 14-point response to US ceasefire proposal via Pakistan
item.description: Iran delivered a detailed counterproposal through Pakistani intermediaries, rejecting imposed peace terms while Trump expressed dissatisfaction with the offer. The diplomatic channel remains active.

item.title: ⛪ Israel accused of destroying Christian convent in southern Lebanon
item.description: Church leaders warn of a growing pattern of Israeli attacks on Christian communities. A French Catholic charity condemned the destruction of the convent, part of broader civilian site targeting.

item.title: 🇮🇱 Israeli security cabinet to discuss possible Gaza war resumption
item.description: Israeli officials cite Hamas non-compliance with disarmament terms. The ceasefire remains fragile as cabinet deliberates next steps.

item.title: ⚔️ Senior Iranian officer warns renewed war with US is likely
item.description: Iranian military leadership signals readiness for renewed hostilities despite ceasefire, underscoring continued tensions in the Gulf region.

item.title: 🤖 US military signs AI deals with 7 tech companies for classified systems
item.description: Pentagon expands AI integration into classified defense systems through partnerships with major tech firms, accelerating military AI adoption.

item.title: 🇦🇪🛢️ UAE announces withdrawal from OPEC, analysts warn of quota chaos
item.description: The UAE has announced it is pulling out of OPEC, a move that analysts say could complicate the group's ability to manage production quotas and coordinate global oil policy.

item.title: 🇵🇭🇺🇸🎯 US-Philippines deploy anti-ship missiles near Taiwan in joint war games
item.description: Philippine and US forces showcased the NMESIS anti-ship missile system in Batanes province during annual exercises, as tensions simmer over Taiwan and the South China Sea.

item.title: ⚖️🇮🇷 Nobel laureate Mohammadi hospitalized in Iran, Nobel committee urges release
item.description: Jailed Nobel Peace Prize laureate Narges Mohammadi was urgently hospitalized after a cardiac crisis. The Nobel Committee chief warned her life is in Iran's hands and called for her release.

item.title: 🇩🇪🚗💰 Trump auto tariffs could cost Germany nearly $18 billion in output
item.description: President Trump's tariff hike on cars and trucks from the EU could cost Germany nearly 15 billion euros in output, according to a German economic institute.

item.title: ⚔️🇺🇦 Russia claims capture of Myropillia village, Ukraine denies
item.description: Russia's Defence Ministry said its troops took control of Myropillia in Ukraine's Sumy region, but Ukraine's military denied the village had changed hands.

item.title: 🇮🇷 Iran Offers Strait of Hormuz Deal as Trump Rejects Peace Proposal
item.description: Iran presented a proposal to mediate the Strait of Hormuz dispute through Pakistan, but US President Trump expressed dissatisfaction with the offer. Fighting could resume after four weeks of suspended bombing.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Russian Forces Close In on Ukrainian Stronghold Kostiantynivka
item.description: Russian troops are advancing toward Kostiantynivka in eastern Donetsk, attempting to establish a foothold near one of Ukraine's most heavily defended positions, according to Kyiv's top military commander.

item.title: 💥 Two Civilians Killed in Russian Drone Attack on Bus in Kherson
item.description: A Russian drone struck a minibus in the southern Ukrainian city of Kherson early Saturday, killing two people and wounding seven others. The attack targeted civilian infrastructure.

item.title: 🛢️ Iraq Says Oil Output Can Recover Within Week After Hormuz Crisis Ends
item.description: Iraq's deputy oil minister announced the country can restore oil production and exports to normal levels within seven days once the Strait of Hormuz shipping crisis is resolved.

item.title: ⚔️ Iran War Standoff Could Leave Trump Worse Off Than Before Conflict
item.description: Analysis suggests the US-Iran conflict has failed to deliver a decisive military or diplomatic victory, potentially leaving Trump in a weaker position than before the war began.

item.title: 🇲🇱 Al-Qaeda affiliate seizes Mali military base, sets up checkpoints near capital
item.description: Jama'at Nusrat al-Islam wal-Muslimin (JNIM) captured a military base in central Mali and established checkpoints on roads to Bamako, as Tuareg separatists also advance toward the capital.

item.title: 🇰🇷 South Korea's Hanwha builds arms empire as Ukraine and Iran wars spur spending
item.description: Hanwha Group is rapidly expanding its defense business, leveraging Philadelphia shipyard ties with US Navy and capitalizing on increased global weapons demand from conflicts in Ukraine and Middle East.

item.title: 🇵🇪 Peru investigates citizens trafficked to fight for Russia in Ukraine
item.description: Peruvian authorities launched an investigation after families reported relatives were deceived with fake job offers and then forced into combat operations once in Russia.

item.title: 🇹🇼✈️ Taiwan president visits Eswatini after China cancelled his trip
item.description: Taiwan's president visited Eswatini days after blaming China for cancelling his trip. China described the visit as a "stowaway-style escape farce" as Taiwan seeks to maintain diplomatic allies.

item.title: 🛢️⚠️ Oil tanker hijacked off Yemen coast, second hijacking in 10 days
item.description: An oil tanker was hijacked off the coast of Yemen and taken toward Somalia, marking the second such incident in the area in the past 10 days amid ongoing regional tensions.

item.title: 🚢 US Warns Shipping Firms Over Iran Strait Transit Payments
item.description: The US is warning shipping companies about potential sanctions for paying Iran to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, as Tehran seeks to monetize vessel transits during the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Blocks US Sanctions on Refineries Buying Iranian Oil
item.description: China's Commerce Ministry issued an injunction blocking US sanctions against five Chinese refineries accused of buying Iranian oil, defying Washington's pressure campaign.

item.title: 🇯🇵 Japan Turns to Russian Oil as Iran War Disrupts Gulf Supplies
item.description: Japanese refiner Taiyo Oil will receive crude from Russia's Sakhalin-2 project as Japan seeks alternative oil sources after the US-Israeli war with Iran disrupted Gulf shipping routes.

item.title: 🇦🇪 UAE Air Traffic Returns to Normal as Iran War Precautions Lifted
item.description: The UAE aviation authority says air traffic has returned to normal after precautionary measures implemented at the start of the Iran war were lifted.

item.title: ⛪ French nun assaulted in Jerusalem in latest anti-Christian attack
item.description: A Catholic nun was assaulted at Davids Tomb in Jerusalem, marking the latest in a series of anti-Christian incidents in the Holy Land amid regional tensions.
